properties.name: app.admin.email
properties.description: Email address for the bootstrap admin account. Set via ADMIN_EMAIL environment variable.

properties.name: app.admin.initial-password
properties.description: Initial password for the bootstrap admin account. Set via ADMIN_INITIAL_PASSWORD environment variable. Only used on first creation.

properties.name: app.swagger.enabled
properties.description: When false, Swagger UI requires ADMIN authentication. Set to false in production.

properties.name: app.cors.allowed-origins
properties.description: Comma-separated list of allowed CORS origins. Set via CORS_ORIGINS environment variable.
